block_00: How to find the optimal time for entering deals?
block_01: To answer this question, it is necessary to learn about the 3 main trading sessions of peak activity: the Asian, European and American ones. The best trading time depends on your strategy, but following the market and the news is beneficial for every trader.
block_02: Check the full article to learn how the different trading sessions affect the market, what currency pairs are affected at what time and how to use this information to find entry points.
block_05: Combining indicators is not complicated when you know what each indicator is used for. In this article we are looking at 3 great combinations of the most popular indicators that work effectively on any chart and any asset.
block_07: What to do when the trend is changing?
block_08: Price reversals are a natural part of the way markets flow. They are a key factor for many trading strategies. Read the full article to find out how to find trend reversals, how to differentiate them from pullbacks and what indicators can be useful for that.
